decisions.rationale: IR nests ai_RNbBHYKS under body ai_RNbBHYKL while the link group is rendered inside footer ai_RNbBHYKV. Decompose AC-3 and layout_notes ('link row above full-width primary button') intentionally colocate link ai_RNbBHYKU with footer Done ai_RNbBHYKW; all criteria_audit rows pass and named ui_refs (ai_RNbBHYKU, ai_RNbBHYKV, ai_RNbBHYKW) are present. ai_RNbBHYKS itself is not a named ui_ref; review ui_evidence marks partial with visual-order rationale. No downstream PATHS-06+ item depends on strict DOM parent_id nesting. Defer IR hierarchy realignment to a polish wave if parity tooling requires body-child placement.

AC-2 explicitly requires 'disclaimer note ai_RNbBHYJM copy from IR' in the popup body. Implementation mounts ai_RNbBHYJM on the coaching-only caption with matching Bubble static text; the popup disclaimer banner correctly uses ai_RNbBHYKM/ai_RNbBHYKO. IR parent ai_RNbBHYJL is on the resource card, but decompose AC names ai_RNbBHYJM for copy parity in this popup — marker reuse is scope-intentional, not a criteria failure.

STATIC_FALLBACK_RESOURCES omit externalLink so the link row is hidden in offline/dev unless Supabase rows supply externalLink. Conditional rendering in ResourceDetailPopup is correct; AC-3 and FV-4 pass when data includes a link. This is prototype dev ergonomics (same class as PATHS-04 C-3), not a live data-contract or downstream blocker — defer optional sample externalLink on a fallback row to a later data-hardening wave.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, rewrite_pass true, 0 blockers, all ACs and FV-4 pass. C-1 deferred: footer link placement matches AC-3/layout_notes despite IR body parent_id. C-2 accepted: ai_RNbBHYJM marker required by AC-2 copy parity. C-3 deferred: dev static fallback missing externalLink is non-blocking polish.
